name: Vitamin D
summary: Decision-ready summary: Vitamin D is best framed for vitamin D deficiency correction; bone health; immune support when deficient; safety screen: hypercalcemia; sarcoidosis; high-dose use without labs.
description: Vitamin D supports bone mineralization and helps prevent deficiency-related effects, with additional roles in immune regulation supported by higher-confidence observational/interventional data.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
